command_sequence.action: Inspect the next manual-gate action queue.
command_sequence.expected_result: Shows current next actions without writing artifacts or applying reviewer decisions.

command_sequence.action: Write the full gold-set import starter and workbook.
Write private gold-set evidence draft files.
command_sequence.expected_result: Private evidence Markdown is registry/review_batches/gold_set_review_evidence.md and evidence JSONL is registry/review_batches/gold_set_review_evidence.jsonl.

command_sequence.action: Fill the gold-set reviewed scratch file.
command_sequence.expected_result: All current claim rows have required manual fields and preserved provenance hashes.

command_sequence.action: Validate the reviewed gold-set scratch file.
command_sequence.expected_result: Import is accepted and gold-set quality thresholds pass.
Gold-set summaries and downstream gates are recomputed.

command_sequence.action: Write private analytical-footprint review assist files.
command_sequence.expected_result: Private workbook is registry/report_intelligence/analytical_footprint_review_workbook.md and JSONL assist is registry/report_intelligence/analytical_footprint_review_assist.jsonl.

command_sequence.action: Write private analytical-footprint evidence draft files.
command_sequence.expected_result: Private evidence Markdown is registry/report_intelligence/analytical_footprint_review_evidence.md and evidence JSONL is registry/report_intelligence/analytical_footprint_review_evidence.jsonl.

command_sequence.action: Fill the analytical-footprint reviewed scratch file.
command_sequence.expected_result: All footprint rows have required manual fields and preserved provenance hashes.

command_sequence.action: Validate the reviewed analytical-footprint scratch file.
command_sequence.expected_result: Import is accepted and footprint quality thresholds pass.
Footprint summaries and downstream gates are recomputed.

command_sequence.action: Confirm only the final lockbox gate remains before opening it.
command_sequence.expected_result: Gold-set, footprint, and source-license criteria pass; lockbox remains not opened.

command_sequence.action: Write the one-time lockbox review starter.
Fill the one-time lockbox review scratch file.
command_sequence.expected_result: Lockbox result, open count, post-open flags, and hashes are complete.
Lockbox import is accepted and production decision is eligible.

command_sequence.action: Simulate the complete reviewed bundle before final apply.
command_sequence.expected_result: Simulation accepts all required reviewed inputs without mutating the original registry.

command_sequence.action: Apply the accepted one-time lockbox review.
command_sequence.expected_result: Lockbox review is recorded and downstream promotion gates are recomputed.
Promotion status reflects the applied manual reviews and lockbox decision.

gates.blocker: manual gold-set review still required; gold set requires >= 50 documents; direction_accuracy below 0.85; variable_mapping_accuracy below 0.80; unsupported_field_false_grounding_rate above 0.05
gates.operator_note: Run prepare-gold-review --full, fill the reviewed scratch JSONL, use registry/review_batches/gold_set_review_workbook.md as the read-only claim checklist, and use registry/review_batches/gold_set_review_assist.md as non-import machine assistance, use registry/review_batches/gold_set_review_evidence.md as private source evidence draft, then dry-run before applying the gold set. For batch work, prepare registry/review_batches/gold_set_reviewed.jsonl with --gold-batch-size/--offset, dry-run it, and apply accepted batches to accumulate progress.

gates.blocker: 1017 analytical footprint review rows still pending; metric_mapping_accuracy 0.558824 below threshold 0.80
gates.operator_note: Generate the private footprint review assist/workbook and evidence draft, fill the reviewed scratch JSONL, keep hashes intact, and dry-run before applying. For batch work, prepare registry/report_intelligence/analytical_footprint_review_batch.jsonl with --limit/--offset, dry-run it, and apply accepted batches to accumulate progress.

gates.apply_command: MOSAIC_RKE_TMPDIR=~/tmp/mosaic-rke TMPDIR=~/tmp/mosaic-rke mosaic-rke build-license-review-import --root . --policy registry/review_batches/source_license_policy_reviewed.json --output registry/review_batches/source_license_policy_import.jsonl && MOSAIC_RKE_TMPDIR=~/tmp/mosaic-rke TMPDIR=~/tmp/mosaic-rke mosaic-rke apply-license-review --root . --input registry/review_batches/source_license_policy_import.jsonl
gates.dry_run_command: MOSAIC_RKE_TMPDIR=~/tmp/mosaic-rke TMPDIR=~/tmp/mosaic-rke mosaic-rke build-license-review-import --root . --policy registry/review_batches/source_license_policy_reviewed.json --output registry/review_batches/source_license_policy_import.jsonl && MOSAIC_RKE_TMPDIR=~/tmp/mosaic-rke TMPDIR=~/tmp/mosaic-rke mosaic-rke apply-license-review --root . --input registry/review_batches/source_license_policy_import.jsonl --dry-run
gates.operator_note: Compliance approval is required before production runtime retrieval. Use registry/review_batches/source_license_review_workbook.md as the read-only source-class checklist. Copy registry/review_batches/source_license_policy_template.json to registry/review_batches/source_license_policy_reviewed.json, fill and sign the reviewed policy, then expand it instead of editing every source row manually.
Run prepare-lockbox-review only after gold-set, analytical-footprint, and source-license gates pass; fill the reviewed scratch JSON, then dry-run before applying the one-time lockbox review.

remaining_blockers: broad-rollout completion audit still has blockers
manual gold-set review still required; gold set requires >= 50 documents; direction_accuracy below 0.85; variable_mapping_accuracy below 0.80; unsupported_field_false_grounding_rate above 0.05
1017 analytical footprint review rows still pending; metric_mapping_accuracy 0.558824 below threshold 0.80
